items.title: David Njoku: Lands one-year deal with Chargers
items.body_text: Njoku agreed Monday with the Chargers on a one-year deal worth up to $8 million, Ian Rapoport of NFL Network reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Bo Nix: On track for minicamp
items.body_text: Head coach Sean Payton told reporters Saturday that Nix (ankle) will throw during mid-June minicamp and should be at full speed at training camp in July, Parker Gabriel of The Denver Post reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Jordyn Tyson: Sits out of Saturday's practice
items.body_text: Tyson did not participate in Saturday's rookie minicamp practice due to a "minor injury," Nick Underhill of NewOrleans.Football reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
